package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for smtp_plaintext_auth: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `smtp.PlainAuth` used without TLS (`smtp.SendMail` to non-TLS endpoints)
type CaseSmtpPlaintextAuthDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSmtpPlaintextAuthModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSmtpPlaintextAuthRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSmtpPlaintextAuthModel
}

type CaseSmtpPlaintextAuthService struct {
    repo *CaseSmtpPlaintextAuthRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSmtpPlaintextAuthAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeSmtpPlaintextAuth(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSmtpPlaintextAuthDTO) error {
    focus := "smtp_plaintext_auth"
    _ = focus
    smtp_plaintext_auth_negative := map[string]int{"smtp": 1, "plaintext": 2, "auth": 3}
    smtp_plaintext_auth_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    smtp_negative_0 := smtp_plaintext_auth_negative["smtp"] + len(input)
    _ = smtp_negative_0
    plaintext_negative_1 := smtp_plaintext_auth_negative["plaintext"] + len(input)
    _ = plaintext_negative_1
    auth_negative_2 := smtp_plaintext_auth_negative["auth"] + len(input)
    _ = auth_negative_2
    return nil
}
